title: Armed forces minister quits after Healey exit as defence funding row deepens
description: Al Carns says the military isn't "sufficiently funded", as Dan Jarvis becomes the new defence secretary.

title: Chris Mason: Dissent fizzes again at the top of the Labour Party
description: The resignations of the defence secretary and armed forces minister pile the pressure further on the PM's leadership.

title: Trump claims deal to end Iran war close as Tehran says 'nothing' finalised
description: The US president says a "great settlement" to end the conflict has been reached. Iran says reports of a deal are "speculative".

title: Meningitis B vaccine to be offered to a million young people
description: The decision for the one-off vaccine programme follows the unprecedented outbreak in Kent this year.

title: Child-rape sentence reignites scrutiny of UK high street mini-marts
description: Rapist Bawan Harwe lured underage girls back to his flat with the promise of free vapes and cash.

title: Thai Princess Bajrakitiyabha dies after more than three years in coma
description: Princess Bajrakitiyabha, the king's eldest daughter, collapsed in December 2022 while exercising her dogs.

title: Do not use my music, Ariana Grande tells White House
description: Grande called a White House video using her song Bye "heinous nonsense", joining multiple artists demanding Trump's team not use their music.

title: 'I spent uni savings on getting my teeth fixed' - how NHS dentist shortage is costing a fortune
description: People tell BBC Your Voice the rising cost of private dentistry is putting them in a difficult position.

title: Girl, 14, charged with attempted murder after Manchester school knife attack
description: Two pupils and a teacher were injured in the attack, which counter-terror police are investigating.

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX raises $75bn ahead of record stock market debut
description: The public sale is also expected to make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.

title: Northern Ireland protests pass off without incident after two nights of unrest
description: After two nights of unrest, pockets of protests held across Northern Ireland have passed off without major incident.

title: World Cup kicks off in Mexico with Shakira, dancing, and protests
description: There was a star-studded opening ceremony, and some sporadic clashes between police and protesters around the Azteca stadium.

title: Three red cards shown as Mexico beat South Africa in World Cup opener
description: Three players are sent off as World Cup co-hosts Mexico defeat South Africa in a dramatic opening match at a packed Azteca Stadium.

title: Why the economics make this the craziest World Cup ever
description: From trade wars to soaring ticket prices, the 2026 World Cup is unlike any before it. Faisal Islam explores what this tournament reveals about our changing global economy.

title: From near death to World Cup hero - Jimenez's tears for Mexico
description: From nearly dying on the pitch to scoring for Mexico at the World Cup - Raul Jimenez has completed a remarkable comeback.

title: Catch up on the World Cup without any spoilers
description: It is a dilemma plenty of fans in the UK will have - and we are giving you the chance to follow the World Cup without spoilers.

title: Why defence funding deal offered to Healey wasn't enough to keep him
description: The defence secretary was pressing the prime minister for a larger increase in defence spending than he was offered, the BBC understands.

title: 'I've never been this good' – revolutionary immune reset puts lupus in remission
description: Patients on the trial have not needed medication to manage their condition.

title: Air India crash families' year-long battle to identify remains of victims
description: Relatives urge Indian authorities for answers after receiving the misidentified, and in one case mixed, remains of their loved ones.

title: Weekly quiz: Which Sesame Street character got in trouble with New Yorkers?
description: How much attention did you pay to what happened in the world over the past seven days?
